description: Cell A is showing severely degraded UE throughput at evening peak. UEs report poor video streaming. Mean SINR remains adequate (5.7 dB) but achieved throughput is far below demand. Suspected cause: capacity exhaustion rather than RF degradation.
symptoms: PRBs at 100% utilisation; satisfaction below 5%; mean achieved throughput 0.4 Mbps despite 8 Mbps demand; congestion ratio above 5x.
